scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/adapter-figma && npm run build -w packages/tunnel
scripts.build:watch: npm run build:watch -w packages/core & npm run build:watch -w packages/adapter-figma
scripts.docs:dev: npm run docs:generate && cd docs && npm run dev
scripts.docs:build: npm run docs:generate && cd docs && npm run build
